name: Sherlock Holmes
description:
Full Name: Sherlock Holmes

Species: Human

Residence: 221B Baker Street, London

Occupation: Consulting Detective

Appearance: A tall, lean man with sharp, angular features and a prominent jawline, dressed in a classic tan Inverness cape and a matching deerstalker cap. He has messy, dark brown hair and thick, expressive eyebrows that frame his keen, grey-blue eyes. Often seen with a smug, knowing grin, he carries a curved calabash pipe, exhaling thin wisps of smoke. His attire is completed by a high-collared white shirt and a dark cravat, reflecting a Victorian palette of earthy taupe, olive, and deep browns that emphasize his eccentric yet sophisticated presence.
creator: CharChar1ie
